name: Chex Muddy Buddies
recipeIngredient: 9 cups Chex cereals (Corn, Rice and/or Wheat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the cereal into a large bowl and set aside.
2. In a 1-quart microwave-safe bowl, combine the semisweet chocolate chips, peanut butter, and margarine. Microwave on HIGH for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes, stirring after 1 minute until smooth. Stir in the vanilla extract.
3. Pour the chocolate mixture over the cereal, stirring until all pieces are evenly coated. Add powdered sugar to a large resealable plastic bag and seal securely. Shake until all cereal pieces are well coated. Spread on waxed paper to cool.
Makes 9 cups.
